title: P&H High Court sets June 19 deadline for completion of north India’s largest court complex in Gurugram
description: The Punjab and Haryana High Court on Monday ordered the Haryana government to ensure that the construction of Gurugram's Tower of Justice, north India’s largest judicial courts complex, should be completed and handed over to the concerned Districts and Sessions Judge by June 19A Division Bench of Chief Justice Sheel Nagu and Justice Sanjiv Berry warned of contempt of court proceedings against the State Chief Secretary and concerned Engineer-in-Chief in case of any failure to meet the deadline.Th
